chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1486 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.7728/2021 (C/A) 01.02.2024 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.4 (Town Officer, Town Committee Mehrabpur), who is also present in Court. This petition was disposed of on 11.12.2019 in the terms whereby it was ordered that as soon as the funds are received by the relevant Town Committee, the increase in pension amount shall be paid to the petitioner. Learned AAG submits that still the funds have not been released. On the other hand, learned Counsel, who has filed the contempt application, submits that Rs.15 million have been paid to the Town Committee Mehrabpur, which, however, the other side has denied. Now, this has become a factual controversy and the Appellate Tribunal Local Councils Sindh has been established for Sukkur Division as per notification dated 10th November 2023, where the petitioner may approach for redressal of his grievance. This application is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
